PROP-01b-partial-inv-011.text: Auction ends if duration elapsed OR remaining balance USD below minAuctionSizeUsd.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-011.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(asset): ended iff (elapsed > duration OR (valid AND balUsd < minAuctionSizeUsd))

locations.note: ended condition: elapsed > duration OR (isPriceValid AND balUsd < minAuctionSizeUsd) at line 251
